title: microlepia speluncae
intro: Microlepia speluncae, also known as the cave fern or cave spleenwort, is a species of fern native to tropical Asia. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. The health benefits of Microlepia speluncae include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and preventing the formation of kidney stones. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made into infusions or decoctions, which can be consumed orally to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
